title: Bump version to 4.3.0
body:
Bump the podman-py version to 4.3.0 to be in lockstep with podman versions.

Signed-off-by: Urvashi Mohnani <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *rhatdan*, *umohnani8* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman-py). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman-py/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan,umohnani8] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
any of the CVEs open we want to get in to 4.3? @umohnani8

> any of the CVEs open we want to get in to 4.3? @umohnani8

which ones are open? I'll vote yes, or maybe a bugfix release later if the CVEs are low-sev / need to be deferred for whatever reason.

We are opting to backport if we need to due to the uncertainty of the new packages. 

/lgtm
@umohnani8 @cdoern thanks for the bump. Could one of you please also push the `v4.3.0` tag to github so we can get rpmbuilds going?

> @umohnani8 @cdoern thanks for the bump. Could one of you please also push the `v4.3.0` tag to github so we can get rpmbuilds going?

nvm me. I see the tag is there already. thanks.
